final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: tactical gear catalog layout, square crop
Primary request: hardcore military tactical equipment display with firearms, ballistic vests, and night vision goggles arranged in neat formation
Scene/backdrop: dark matte surface, minimal studio backdrop, military storage or armory aesthetic
Subject: assault rifles, tactical handguns, plate carriers with ballistic panels, night vision goggles, magazine pouches, tactical gloves, arranged in grid or symmetrical layout
Style/medium: photorealistic product photography, editorial military catalog
Composition/framing: top-down flat lay with slight angle, wide shot showing full arrangement, sharp focus across all items
Lighting/mood: cold harsh directional lighting from above, dramatic shadows, professional and authoritative atmosphere
Color palette: deep charcoal black background + gunmetal gray + olive drab + tactical tan + cold blue-white highlights
Materials/textures: matte polymer firearm finishes, woven ballistic nylon, carbon fiber plates, rubberized grips, metallic magazines with realistic wear
Constraints: maintain clean orderly arrangement, all equipment must be recognizable and proportionally accurate
Avoid: cluttered composition, warm lighting, cartoonish rendering, watermarks, text overlays
